listening.title: Listening: Announcement
listening.transcript: Smoking is forbidden in this building. This form must be completed before Friday. An ID is required for all visitors.

questions.question: What must be completed before Friday?
questions.explanation: "This form must be completed before Friday."

listening.title: Listening: Statistics report
listening.transcript: A large number of students passed the exam this year. The vast majority of people agree with this policy.

questions.question: ___ of people agree with the policy.
questions.explanation: "The vast majority of people agree with this policy."
